claims.plain_language_claim: The phi-exponent scoring rule beats the flat-exponent baseline on the Kubota 20-row pilot.
allowed_public_language: The Kubota 20-row pilot did not meet the preregistered margin.
The specific phi-exponent pilot did not beat the flat baseline by the declared margin.
This result applies to the declared Kubota pilot only.
forbidden_public_language: The Kubota pilot proves the Lattice Law.
claims.next_required_step: Any future Kubota holdout or full-dataset test requires a new preregistration with power justification before scoring.
